name: Northern Scorpion
description: A large and dangerous Grounded 2 scorpion that punishes mistakes with claws, jumps, and a stinger.
behavior: It patrols its area aggressively and uses rushes, claws, and burrowing to control space.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks immediately and can chain pressure if the player stays close.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually fights almost any creature that enters its territory.
strategy: Learn its burrow windows and punish it after it comes back out of the ground.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 2-Hit Combo: 28. Long Combo: 35. Claw Slam: 72. Burrow Strike: 90.

abilities.name: 2-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A quick two-hit opener used to keep you pinned in front of it.

abilities.name: Long Combo
abilities.description: It extends the claw sequence to punish impatient responses.

abilities.name: Claw Slam
abilities.description: A heavy claw impact used to shut down any attempt to step in too early.

abilities.name: Burrow Strike
abilities.description: It burrows and erupts violently to hit where the player thinks it is safe.
